scripts.build: yarn build-shared-code && concurrently "yarn workspace api build" "yarn workspace web build"
scripts.build-shared-code: yarn workspace @Madeirense/database prisma && yarn workspace @Madeirense/database build && yarn workspace @Madeirense/shared build
scripts.build:dev: yarn build-shared-code:dev && concurrently "yarn workspace api build" "yarn workspace web build"
scripts.build:dev-web: yarn build-shared-code:dev && concurrently "yarn workspace api build" "yarn workspace web build"
scripts.build-shared-code:dev: yarn workspace @Madeirense/database prisma:dev && yarn workspace @Madeirense/database build && yarn workspace @Madeirense/shared build
scripts.build:staging: yarn build-shared-code:staging && concurrently "yarn workspace api build" "yarn workspace web build"
scripts.build-shared-code:staging: yarn workspace @Madeirense/database prisma:staging && yarn workspace @Madeirense/database build && yarn workspace @Madeirense/shared build
scripts.clean: rm -rf packages/api/node_modules/ && rm -rf packages/shared/node_modules/ && rm -rf packages/mobile/node_modules/ && rm -rf packages/web/node_modules/ && rm -rf node_modules/ yarn.lock
scripts.reinstall: yarn clean && yarn cache clean && yarn
scripts.start: "yarn workspace api start" "yarn workspace web start"
